title: Test Mysterious Door: 119-E03 SCHEDULE_RETURN_TO_HAND

plan.providerWarning: No WARD_LLM_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY found. The app will use local fallback plans until a server key is configured.

card.rawText: Play this card when your opponent plays a magic card. Inflict 10 damage to your primary creature to negate the card effect and instead send it to the cemetery. Return this card to your hand after 3 turn cycles.

plan.title: Test Mysterious Door: 119-E03 SCHEDULE_RETURN_TO_HAND
